form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 1750m at Swan Hill was 6th-13.6 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Over The Line (2:06.60) in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $11. Before that, a game effort when 3rd (Sr2) over 1790m at this track, at the bell was 6th-11.2 beaten 13 m by Shes Poppy (2:12.40) in NR 47 to 51 on March 27 at $12. Can improve from a better draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Half carted, leaving the front straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr2) over 1790m at this track, at the bell was 5th-8 beaten 11 m by Hooklineandsinker (2:11.00) in NR 52 to 56 on March 27 at $19. Two runs back 4th (Sr5) over 1790m at this track, at the bell was 9th-16 beaten 4.5 m by Diamond Krusher (2:12.10) in NR up to 50 on March 20 at $11. This looks a far sterner task.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up around the home turn and early in the home straight.
Held up for clear running entering the home straight.
Hung in during the middle stages of the score up.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr2) over 2240m at Swan Hill beaten 30 m by Thunderfire (2:43.30) in NR 50 to 55 on March 31 at $31. Before that, 8th (Sr6) over 2150m at Bendigo, beaten 9 m by The Golden Hook (2:35.90) in NR 47 to 51 on March 25 at $23. Winning claims on best efforts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running during the early stages of the run to the finish.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 3rd (Sr4) over 2190m at this track, beaten 8 m by Eyesealittle (2:43.80) in MAIDEN on October 21 at $17. Maybe later.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 3rd (Sr4) over 2190m at this track, beaten 8 m by Eyesealittle (2:43.80) in MAIDEN on October 21 at $17. Maybe later.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running on the final turn.
Out of position at the start despite the efforts of its driver.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 7th (Fr4) over 1790m after showing early pace at this track was 3rd-4 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Hooklineandsinker (2:11.00) in NR 52 to 56 on March 27 at $4.40. The start before 6th (Sr1) over 2190m at this track beaten 25 m by Dallas Miki (2:39.30) in NR 51 to 55 on March 20 at $4.60. This looks a nice assignment so watch for a better run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Momentarily inconvenienced as Foxy Two Gloves shifted wider near the 650m.
Over raced when leading throughout the early and middle stages of the race.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth behind Our Art Work at this track over 1790m in a NR up to 59 on March 10 at $126. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Dallas Miki at this track over 2190m in a NR 51 to 55 on March 20 at $12. Fitter and ready to win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Weakened over the final stages to finish in 8th position, beaten 67.4m.
Inconvenienced and forced wider into a four wide position from near the 800m.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Rocknroll Lenny at this track over 1790m in a 0-3 WINs on March 20 at $4.20. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing third behind Hooklineandsinker at this track over 1790m in a NR 52 to 56 on March 27 at $5.50. With even luck is a winning chance.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr6) over 1790m after racing wide at this track was 9th-13 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Hooklineandsinker (2:11.00) in NR 52 to 56 on March 27 at $34. Before that, surrendered the lead and finished 7th (Fr4) over 2190m at this track beaten 35 m by Dallas Miki (2:39.30) in NR 51 to 55 on March 20 at $11. Can do much better.
